Joinder In Motion To Change Venue [Ccp 397(C)]
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EMERY L. CHEN, MD'S JOINDER IN MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE [CCP 397(C)] (of defendant Catholic Healthcare West).
Appearances: Lorie A. Kruse of LaFollette Johnson (916.563.3100) for defendant Catholic Healthcare West; Drew M. Widders of Wilcoxen & Callaham (916.442.2777) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Aimee Lambert of Schuering Zimmerman & Doyle (916.567.0400) appearing via Court Call for Defendant Emery Chen, MD.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion for change of venue to Yolo County is granted. Defendants have met their burden under CCP 397. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Widders of Wilcoxen & Callaham (916.442.2777) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Aimee Lambert of Schuering Zimmerman & Doyle (916.567.0400) appearing via Court Call for Defendant Emery Chen, MD.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion for change of venue to Yolo County is granted. Defendants have met their burden under CCP 397. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
